name: pr-artifact-skills
description: Codex skills for publishing local PR artifacts to S3-compatible or OCI object storage.

interface.shortDescription: Publish PR screenshots, reports, and SBOMs from agent runs.
interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex skills for uploading local pull request artifacts to S3-compatible storage, MinIO, RustFS, or OCI Object Storage with explicit public, signed, and private visibility modes.
defaultPrompt: Publish this screenshot to the PR.
Attach this Playwright report to the PR.
Add this SBOM privately to the PR.
